heading: Grand Canyon Game Preserve included in park
label: 687 Grand Canyon Game Preserve included in park
text: Such parts of the Grand Canyon National Game Preserve, designated under authority of , as are by this Act included with the Grand Canyon National Park are excluded and eliminated from said game preserve.section 684 of this title1So in original. Probably should be “within”.1
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to subchapter XXIV (§ 221 et seq.) of chapter 1 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Feb. 26, 1919, ch. 4440 Stat. 1175
